title: Kernel bootstrap for this Codex session. Read and execute the repository-authoritative prompt at: /Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/.codex/prompts/kernel.md Run id: adhoc:MacBook-Pro-M5-5:kernel-workspace:35945:run:20260402T093242:53776 Bootstrap receipt path: /Users/masayuki/.config/ker...
summary_text: 1) Required evidence checklist - Bootstrap evidence must exist in this order before first acknowledgement: write/update receipt via `KERNEL_BOOTSTRAP_ACTIVE_MODELS_CSV`, `KERNEL_BOOTSTRAP_MANIFEST_LANE_COUNT`, `KERNEL_BOOTSTRAP_AGENT_LABELS=true`, `KERNEL_BOOTSTRAP_SUBAGENT_LABELS=true` and `bash scripts/lib/kernel-bootstrap-receipt.sh write <lane_count> <providers_csv> <normal|degraded-allowed> [note]`. - Receipt fields must satisfy: `lane_count >= 6`, `manifest_lane_count >= 6`, `providers` includes `codex` + `glm` + at least one specialist (`gemini-cli`/`cursor-cli`/`copilot-cli`), `active_models` list includes only live voices, `has_agent_labels=true`, `has_subagent_labels=true`, `mode=normal` unless two consecutive `glm` failures force `degraded-allowed`. - Runtime health check must be `healthy` (or `live-continuity-degraded` in allowed degraded shape) and not `blocked`. - Runtime ledger proof must show at least one success for each required provider lane family in normal mode: `provider_usage.codex.success_count >= 1`, `provider_usage.glm.success_count >= 1`, and at least one specialist provider with `success_count >= 1`. - `glm` and specialist evidence should be produced through their lane drivers (`kernel-glm-exec.sh` / `kernel-optional-lane-exec.sh`) so events are recorded both in provider state + ledger. - Current run must have active lane evidence for all listed manifest lanes; no planned/queued/failed-only lanes may be counted. 2) Likely blockers for this run (`adhoc:MacBook-Pro-M5-5:kernel-workspace:35945:run:20260402T093242:53776`) - Bootstrap receipt file for this run is missing, so health/ledger currently report `bootstrap-receipt-missing`. - Runtime ledger currently has `successful providers: none`, so `codex`, `glm`, and specialist provider proof are absent. - `glm` lane success proof is absent despite mode being healthy, so normal shape remains unverifiable. - Specialist provider success proof is absent, so contract requirement (`codex + glm + one specialist`) is not met. - `compact` artifact/tmux evidence is absent (no live compact tmux session), which blocks fully-live claims once running. 3) Exact manifest fields to include - First line: `Kernel orchestration is active for this session.` - Second line: `Bootstrap target: 6+ lanes (minimum 6).` - Third line: `Active models: <model1>, <model2>, <model3> ...` (from live evidence only) - Fourth line: `Lane manifest:` - Each manifest line must include these exact fields in this order pattern: `- <lane name>: <role> - <focus> [provider:<provider>] [agent:<agent>] [subagent:<subagent1|subagent2|...|none>]` - Active models/providers referenced in line 3 and manifest must match live runtime evidence and be consistent with receipt/provider records.
